Contact

Let's Begin Something

Whether it's a river journey, a speaking invitation, a creative collaboration, or a mentorship conversation — reach out. This work grows through relationship.

What to reach out about

🛶 River trips & guiding inquiries
🎤 Speaking, workshops & presentations
🤝 Creative collaborations & partnerships
🌿 Community programs & youth mentorship
📰 Media, press & research requests

Send a message

Message sent.

Bobbi Rose will be in touch. Thank you for reaching out.

Land Acknowledgment

Bobbi Rose lives and works on the traditional territory of the Kwanlin Dün First Nation and the Ta'an Kwäch'än Council in Whitehorse, Yukon, with deep roots in Teetl'it Gwich'in territory in Fort McPherson, NWT.

Learn whose land you're on ↗

Bobbi Rose

Teetl'it Gwich'in. Culture. Land. Rivers.

River guide, mentor, artist, and land protector based in Whitehorse, Yukon. Owner of Dinjii Zhuh Adventures. Carrying Gwich'in knowledge forward through every river journey and story shared.

hello@bobbirose.ca
